Build Output Assay, not Human Slop Detector

"Human Slop Detector" is the internal joke.
Output Assay evaluates any artifact: human, AI, committee, Slack thread, pitch deck, strategy memo, model response, whatever.

The system does not judge who wrote the text.
It measures whether the text paid for the attention it consumed.
That is the doctrine.

The primitive is not "slop score".
The primitive is claim -> support gap.
That is the knife.

Build Output Assay, not Human Slop Detector

"Human Slop Detector" is the internal joke.
Output Assay evaluates any artifact: human, AI, committee, Slack thread, pitch deck, strategy memo, model response, whatever.

The system does not judge who wrote the text.
It measures whether the text paid for the attention it consumed.

This should obviously become a first-class Episode type.
It will change how teams write and decide.
Build the local-only, fixture-backed CLI first.
